h03680065g0b27g4d38gb0ceg770c20ba88fd: We have nothing more to discuss. Continue on thy way, as if I were not here.
h8d697447g7063g42d6gb34ag4d8c146fde0d: I must attend this place, after so many years away. We will see each other again soon.
h8a3fea0ag22aeg433fg96c9gb4531e7c442a: When the time is proper. I do not know that hour any more than dost thou.
he933292eg6d3fg45e0ga1a4ge90c2fbe693e: But I do know that the longer thou standest here, the farther away our second meeting becomes.
h1e59d446ge530g4ccbg8908g4d5497148de1: You better not follow me. There would be consequences.
hd520fdf7g313ag43b2ga7e4g497cc37bf97b: I had no intention of following thee. We will find one another regardless.
hfd1d9deagb45bg42ceg8806gfb767ea1f941: Inevitability is a wheel that turns of its own accord.
hc4036c4fg73e9g4688g832bgb88df189fbc8: You seem very certain of that. How?
ha4adef90g082dg4151g818eg8227842fa539: The mechanics of fate would be difficult to explain to one such as thyself.
hc3fb09a7gd03ag4426g8a99g62b4fe6e2876: Ah, thou as well? It is noted.
